description: Style NoteIt's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient.Product DetailsWhite and grey shoe with mesh upper, synthetic overlays, reinforced overlay at the heel counter and central lace-upsMeshed and padded tongue and blue inner Thick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with branded lugs The shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
